svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/26.2.2 Chrome/134.0.6998.178 Electron/35.1.2 Safari/537.36" version="26.2.2"> <diagram id="ci-pipeline" name="CI/CD Pipeline Stages"> <mxGraphModel dx="-455" dy="-72" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="900" pageHeight="250" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" value="CI/CD Pipeline Stages" style="text;html=1;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;align=center;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="250" y="10" width="400" height="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="build" value="Build
(Linux + MCU)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="30" y="60" width="150" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="build_t" value="~5 min" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#666;align=center;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="55" y="120" width="100" height="15" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="analysis" value="Analysis
(MISRA + cppcheck)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="230" y="60" width="170" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="analysis_t" value="~3 min" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#666;align=center;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="265" y="120" width="100" height="15" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sil" value="SIL Tests
(QEMU dual-VM)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="450" y="60" width="160" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sil_t" value="~10 min" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#666;align=center;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="480" y="120" width="100" height="15" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="yocto" value="Yocto Image
(main branch only)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="660" y="60" width="170" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="yocto_t" value="~120 min" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#666;align=center;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="695" y="120" width="100" height="15" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" style="strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" source="build" target="analysis" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" style="strokeColor=#d6b656;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" source="analysis" target="sil" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" style="strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" source="sil" target="yocto" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note" value="All stages run in isolated Docker containers. No host toolchain required." style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#999;fontSize=9;fontStyle=2;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="200" y="155" width="500" height="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g1" value="✖" style="text;html=1;fontSize=14;fontColor=#b85450;fontStyle=1;align=center;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="195" y="68" width="20" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g2" value="✖" style="text;html=1;fontSize=14;fontColor=#b85450;fontStyle=1;align=center;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="415" y="68" width="20" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g3" value="✖" style="text;html=1;fontSize=14;fontColor=#b85450;fontStyle=1;align=center;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="625" y="68" width="20" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g_note" value="✖ = quality gate (fail blocks downstream)" style="text;html=1;fontSize=8;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#b85450;align=center;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="200" y="195" width="500" height="15" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
